# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

TexEcon is a static site. Security updates are applied on the `main` branch and released through the normal deployment workflow.

| Version | Supported |
| --- | --- |
| `main` | :white_check_mark: |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Please do not open public GitHub issues for potential security vulnerabilities.

Use one of the following options instead:

1. GitHub private vulnerability reporting:
   - Open: https://github.com/markhazleton/Texecon/security/advisories/new
2. If needed, contact the maintainer directly and include:
   - A clear description of the issue
   - Reproduction steps or proof of concept
   - Potential impact and affected paths/components

You can expect an initial response within 5 business days. We will coordinate disclosure and remediation timing with the reporter.

## Disclosure Process

After confirmation:

1. We will triage severity and impact.
2. A fix will be prepared and reviewed.
3. The fix will be deployed to production.
4. A security advisory will be published when appropriate.
